title: Clamav antivirus: fanotify_init failed: Operation not permitted
body:
### Issue Description

I use roootles mode, and try to run container in rootless mode:

I try to run clamav antivirus in container, in run comand i pass all capabilities:
`podman run -d --cap-add=ALL --name rocky mymirror.localhost/rocky8`

after i login in to container, and install calmav antivirus.
When is start it, i get error:
Aug 28 15:58:52 abb6eb38006f clamonacc[16788]: ERROR: Clamonacc: fanotify_init failed: Operation not permitted
Aug 28 15:58:52 abb6eb38006f clamonacc[16788]: ERROR: Clamonacc: clamonacc must have elevated permissions ... exiting

I use recommendations from:
https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2028060,
but it`s not work.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman run -d --cap-add=ALL --name rocky mymirror.localhost/rocky8`
2. `podman exec -it rocky bash`
3. `[root@abb6eb38006f /]# dnf install clamd clamav`
4. `[root@abb6eb38006f /]# systemctl restart clamav-clamonacc.service`
`[root@abb6eb38006f /]# systemctl status clamav-clamonacc.service`
● clamav-clamonacc.service - ClamAV On-Access Scanner
   Loaded: loaded (/usr/lib/systemd/system/clamav-clamonacc.service; disabled; vendor preset: disabled)
   Active: failed (Result: exit-code) since Mon 2023-08-28 18:16:35 MSK; 2s ago
     Docs: man:clamonacc(8)
           man:clamd.conf(5)
           https://docs.clamav.net/
  Process: 17206 ExecStart=/usr/sbin/clamonacc -F --config-file=/etc/clamd.d/scan.conf (code=exited, status=2)
 Main PID: 17206 (code=exited, status=2)

Aug 28 18:16:35 abb6eb38006f systemd[1]: Started ClamAV On-Access Scanner.
Aug 28 18:16:35 abb6eb38006f clamonacc[17206]: ERROR: Clamonacc: fanotify_init failed: Operation not permitted
Aug 28 18:16:35 abb6eb38006f clamonacc[17206]: ERROR: Clamonacc: clamonacc must have elevated permissions ... exiting ...

if i start clamav-clamonacc.service in root mode (after admit settings from https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2028060), service start and workin (on root mode).

### Describe the results you received

service clamav-clamonacc.service can`t start

### Describe the results you expected

clamav-clamonacc.service cat start and working

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Given that `--cap-add=all` is passed, this is most likely a kernel restriction; I can't find any mention of user namespaces in the `fanotify_init` manpage, but given that it requires `CAP_SYS_ADMIN` and that capability is very restricted for rootless containers.
Try in --privileged mode to make sure SELinux or Seccomp is not blocking.  But it is likely that real SYS_ADMIN acces is required versus Namespaced SYS_ADMIN.
given this is not likely a podman issue but more of a "how do i run my container" question, should this be closed or moved to a discussion?

Docker runs as root by default.  Since it works with root Docker and root Podman, I assume that the workload just requires true root privileges which is confirmed in the blog (https://blog.clamav.net/2019/09/understanding-and-transitioning-to.html). In that case, there is nothing Podman can do.
If you run docker in rootless mode you will have the same problem.
